mapper.insert: INSERT INTO qna_report (qna_id, member_id, qna_report_reason, qna_report_status, qna_report_created_at, qna_report_content) VALUES (#{qnaId}, #{memberId}, #{qnaReportReason}, '접수', NOW(), #{qnaReportContent})
mapper.select: SELECT r.qna_report_id, r.qna_id, r.member_id, r.qna_report_reason, r.qna_report_status, r.qna_report_created_at, r.qna_report_content, m.member_name, q.qna_title, q.member_id AS reported_member_id, author.member_name AS reported_member_name FROM qna_report r JOIN member m ON r.member_id = m.member_id LEFT JOIN qna q ON r.qna_id = q.qna_id LEFT JOIN member author ON q.member_id = author.member_id ORDER BY r.qna_report_created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE qna_report SET qna_report_status = #{qnaReportStatus} WHERE qna_report_id = #{qnaReportId}
